field.role: tells you what exists (field / substrate / scalar manifold state)

shear.role: tells you how it deforms (shear / metric deformation / lawful geometry)

packet.role: tells you what is emitted/witnessed (packet / executable typed glyph-witness / codec event)

spectral.role: tells you what basis survives (spectral / eigenbasis / pruning-correlation structure)

equations.name: Chemical_Descriptor_Vector
equations.mapping: Molecule as point in descriptor space = packet representation

equations.name: Chemical_Space_Distance
equations.mapping: Chemical similarity as geometric distance = shear metric

equations.name: Weighted_Chemical_Space_Distance
equations.mapping: Weighted semantic distance = weighted shear metric

equations.name: Chemical_Structure_Property_Map
equations.mapping: Property prediction over chemical space = packet transform

equations.name: Molecular_Configuration_Space
equations.mapping: N-atom molecular configuration space = field manifold

equations.name: Potential_Energy_Surface
equations.mapping: Energy as scalar field over configuration space = field state

equations.name: Molecular_Force
equations.mapping: Force as gradient of potential energy = shear deformation

equations.name: Molecular_Dynamics_Newtonian
equations.mapping: Classical molecular dynamics = shear dynamics (force-driven deformation)

equations.name: Molecular_Force_Field_Energy
equations.equation: V(R) = Σ_bonds k_b(r-r0)^2 + Σ_angles kθ(θ-θ0)^2 + Σ_dihedrals Vn[1+cos(nφ-γ)] + Σ_{i<j} 4εij[(σij/rij)^12-(σij/rij)^6] + Σ_{i<j} qiqj/(4πε0rij)
equations.mapping: Generic molecular mechanics force field = field energy surface

equations.name: Coulomb_Matrix_Descriptor
equations.equation: Cij = 0.5Zi^2.4 if i=j; ZiZj/||Ri-Rj|| if i≠j
equations.mapping: Molecular descriptor based on charge and geometry = packet encoding

equations.name: Local_Atomic_Density_Kernel
equations.mapping: Local atomic density and similarity kernel = packet similarity metric

equations.name: Arrhenius_Rate
equations.mapping: Reaction rate over activation barrier = shear rate (temperature-driven deformation)

equations.name: Eyring_Transition_State_Rate
equations.mapping: Transition-state rate equation = shear rate (free energy-driven deformation)

equations.name: Boltzmann_Distribution
equations.mapping: Energy landscape to probability distribution = field state (probability field)

equations.name: Quantum_Hamiltonian_Eigenproblem
equations.mapping: Quantum energy eigenproblem = spectral decomposition (Hamiltonian eigenbasis)

equations.name: Quantum_Hamiltonian_Variational_Energy
equations.mapping: Variational quantum energy optimization = spectral optimization (basis optimization)

equations.name: DFT_Energy_Functional
equations.mapping: Electron density to energy functional = field state (density field → energy field)

equations.name: Bayesian_Optimization_Chemical_Space
equations.equation: f(x) ~ GP(μ(x), k(x,x')); x_next = argmax_x α(x); EI(x) = E[max(f(x)-f_best, 0)]
equations.mapping: Search policy over chemical/material space = spectral optimization (Gaussian process basis)

insights.field_core: energy landscapes, density fields, probability distributions
insights.cross_domain_consistency: Each primitive appears across multiple scientific domains
insights.no_gaps: Each primitive well-represented across chemistry, physics, thermodynamics, quantum chemistry
